projectDescription: An AI agent hub for Oregon State University that lets students and faculty sign in with their OSU account and interact with a registry of specialized AI agents via the open A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol.
keyFeatures: OSU Microsoft SSO authentication — sign in with existing OSU credentials
Agent registry for discovering and installing community-built AI agents
A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol over JSON-RPC 2.0 for standardized inter-agent communication
OSU RAG knowledge base — answers questions about Oregon State University using crawled *.oregonstate.edu data
Multi-agent pipelines — agents can collaborate and route tasks to each other
Support for Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini as standalone A2A agent servers
Full-stack SvelteKit frontend with FastAPI/SQLite production backend
One-command Docker deployment and automated GCP Cloud Run CI/CD
publicApiSurface: POST /api/agents/register — manually register an A2A agent
POST /api/agents/register-by-url — register agent by fetching its well-known card
POST /api/registry — submit an agent to the public registry
POST /api/chats — create a new chat thread
